description_long: This is a corner wall structure composed of two intersecting brick walls forming a right angle, with a realistic red and brown brickwork pattern. The bricks are arranged in a traditional running bond, with visible mortar lines and some variation in brick coloration, giving the wall a textured and authentic appearance. The floor is made of wooden planks with a medium brown finish, adding warmth to the scene. Mounted on one wall is a modern, matte black wall lamp with a conical shade, providing a functional and decorative element. A simple wooden chair with a square seat and backrest is placed against the wall, suggesting a utilitarian or waiting area. The overall setting evokes an urban or industrial interior, such as a loft, café, or alleyway corner.
description: A corner of intersecting red brick walls with a wooden floor, featuring a black wall lamp and a simple wooden chair.
description_view_0: View of the brick corner with both walls visible, showing the wall lamp and chair against the back wall.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the lamp and chair placement along the right wall, with more floor visible.
description_view_2: Close-up of the left brick wall, showing detailed brick texture and mortar lines.
description_view_3: Close-up of the right brick wall, focusing on the brick pattern and coloration.
